notes: Definition-only file containing a single `structure HasseWitnesses` that bundles the four deferred Hasse bound witnesses (separability, finite-dimensionality, V.1.3 sepDegree identity, QF non-negativity), all anchored on the genuine `isogOneSub_negFrobenius` isogeny. No proofs, no sorries, no maxHeartbeats overrides; the bulk of the file is detailed docstring commentary explaining the anti-circularity design of the `pc_sepDeg_eq_pointCount` field.
